title: Paul Seixas Pushes Tadej Pogačar Deeper — But Can’t Match Him Yet
content:
Pogačar still rules at Liège-Bastogne-Liège. But Seixas just showed he can be challenged and that changes what comes next.

Read the full article at Paul Seixas Pushes Tadej Pogačar Deeper — But Can’t Match Him Yet on Velo.
author: ahood
